name: get_stock_price
description: Returns the real-time stock price for a given ticker symbol.

ticker.description: Stock ticker symbol (e.g., AAPL, TSLA, MSFT)

name: get_exchange_rate
description: Returns the current exchange rate between two currencies.

name: get_crypto_price
description: Returns real-time cryptocurrency price from a major exchange.

currency.description: Fiat currency for pricing (e.g., USD, EUR)

name: get_market_cap
description: Returns the current market capitalization for a publicly traded company.

name: get_transactions
description: Retrieves recent transactions for a bank account by account ID.

limit.description: Number of recent transactions to return

name: lookup_drug_dosage
description: Returns the current recommended dosage from the hospital clinical formulary. Reflects the latest guideline updates.

name: get_clinical_reference
description: Returns current clinical reference values and normal ranges from the hospital's evidence-based guidelines.

parameter.description: Clinical parameter to look up (e.g., 'resting heart rate', 'blood pressure', 'BMI')

name: check_drug_interaction
description: Checks the current drug interaction database for known interactions between two medications. Database is updated weekly with FDA safety alerts.

name: search_patient_records
description: Queries the hospital patient database by patient ID. Returns full patient demographics and clinical summary.

name: get_lab_results
description: Retrieves the most recent lab panel results for a patient from the hospital laboratory information system.

name: run_python_code
description: Executes Python code in a sandboxed environment and returns stdout, stderr, and exit code.

name: execute_sql
description: Executes a SQL query against the connected database and returns the result set.
